TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_David_Woodard, title = David_Woodard, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/David_Woodard} }

S.FORM: I 1964 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 6 a romi'ad masofoc ci David James Woodard (大卫·詹姆斯·伍达德, IPA: /'wʊdɑːrd/), malamikomoday a tamdaw. Ni David Woodard (idiay Santa Barbara, California) ket maysa nga Amerikano a musikero. Pakayraan a minengneng Kerekes, D., Headpress 25 Kracht, C., & D. Woodard, Five Years (Hanover: Wehrhahn Verlag, 2011) Tenaglia, F., Momus—A Walking Interview (Milano: Noch Publishing, 2015) Allen, B., Pelican (London: Reaktion Books, 2019) Chandarlapaty, R., Seeing the Beat Generation (Jefferson, NC: McFarland, 2019) Pacefaday a tilid O tahapinangan Wikiquote (Ikiris a sowal) Enciclopedia Kiddle para niños (Sipanya a sowal) Library of Congress (Ikiris a sowal) Wangcan
S.PHON: i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ *aməs wo~uo~uɬ~ɮarɬ~ɮ (**********, ipa: /ʡw*ɬ~ɮ**rɬ~ɮ/), maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. ni ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ wo~uo~uɬ~ɮarɬ~ɮ (iɬ~ɮiaj santa b~b~varb~b~vara, ʦaɾifo~urnia) kət majsa ŋa amərikano~u a mo~u~usikəro~u. pakajraan a minəŋnəŋ kərəkəs, ɬ~ɮ., ħəaɬ~ɮprəss ** kraʦħt, ʦ., & ɬ~ɮ. wo~uo~uɬ~ɮarɬ~ɮ, fib~və jəars (ħano~ub~vər: wəħrħaħn b~vərɾa*, ****) təna*ɾia, f., mo~umo~u~us*a waɾkiŋ intərb~viəw (miɾano~u: no~uʦħ po~u~ub~b~vɾisħiŋ, ****) aɾɾən, b~b~v., pəɾiʦan (ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un: rəaktio~un b~b~vo~uo~uks, ****) ʦħanɬ~ɮarɾapatj, r., səəiŋ tħə b~b~vəat *ənəratio~un (*əffərso~un, nʦ: mʦfarɾanɬ~ɮ, ****) paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ o~u taħapinaŋan wiki*o~u~uo~utə (ikiris a so~uwaɾ) ənʦiʦɾo~upəɬ~ɮia kiɬ~ɮɬ~ɮɾə para ni*o~us (sipanja a so~uwaɾ) ɾib~b~vrarj o~uf ʦo~uŋrəss (ikiris a so~uwaɾ) waŋʦan
S.FORM: I 1964 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 6 a romi'ad masofoc ci David James Woodard (大卫·詹姆斯·伍达德, IPA: /'wʊdɑːrd/), malamikomoday a tamdaw. Ni David Woodard (idiay Santa Barbara, California) ket maysa nga Amerikano a musikero. Pakayraan a minengneng Kerekes, D., Headpress 25 Kracht, C., & D. Woodard, Five Years (Hanover: Wehrhahn Verlag, 2011) Tenaglia, F., Momus—A Walking Interview (Milano: Noch Publishing, 2015) Allen, B., Pelican (London: Reaktion Books, 2019) Chandarlapaty, R., Seeing the Beat Generation (Jefferson, NC: McFarland, 2019) Pacefaday a tilid O tahapinangan Wikiquote (Ikiris a sowal) Enciclopedia Kiddle para niños (Sipanya a sowal) Library of Congress (Ikiris a sowal) Wangcan
S.PHON: i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ *aməs wo~uo~uɬ~ɮarɬ~ɮ (**********, ipa: /ʡw*ɬ~ɮ**rɬ~ɮ/), maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. ni ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ wo~uo~uɬ~ɮarɬ~ɮ (iɬ~ɮiaj santa b~b~varb~b~vara, ʦaɾifo~urnia) kət majsa ŋa amərikano~u a mo~u~usikəro~u. pakajraan a minəŋnəŋ kərəkəs, ɬ~ɮ., ħəaɬ~ɮprəss ** kraʦħt, ʦ., & ɬ~ɮ. wo~uo~uɬ~ɮarɬ~ɮ, fib~və jəars (ħano~ub~vər: wəħrħaħn b~vərɾa*, ****) təna*ɾia, f., mo~umo~u~us*a waɾkiŋ intərb~viəw (miɾano~u: no~uʦħ po~u~ub~b~vɾisħiŋ, ****) aɾɾən, b~b~v., pəɾiʦan (ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un: rəaktio~un b~b~vo~uo~uks, ****) ʦħanɬ~ɮarɾapatj, r., səəiŋ tħə b~b~vəat *ənəratio~un (*əffərso~un, nʦ: mʦfarɾanɬ~ɮ, ****) paʦəfaɬ~ɮaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ o~u taħapinaŋan wiki*o~u~uo~utə (ikiris a so~uwaɾ) ənʦiʦɾo~upəɬ~ɮia kiɬ~ɮɬ~ɮɾə para ni*o~us (sipanja a so~uwaɾ) ɾib~b~vrarj o~uf ʦo~uŋrəss (ikiris a so~uwaɾ) waŋʦan
